summary: Iteration 40 - International/EU/Foreign-user flows testing. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: 5 client types, InternationalGuidanceCard with all blocks (translation, validation, requirements, safety note), Services page international area, Catalog page Internazionale filter with 13 procedures.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/catalog/categories returns 7 categories including 'internazionale' with 13 procedures - VERIFIED
GET /api/catalog returns 136 total procedures - VERIFIED

8 official international procedures exist (TRADUZIONE_GIURATA, APOSTILLE_DOCUMENTO, LEGALIZZAZIONE_CONSOLARE, CF_STRANIERO, RICONOSCIMENTO_TITOLO, RICONOSCIMENTO_PROFESSIONALE, PERMESSO_SOGGIORNO_SUPPORT, DICHIARAZIONE_PRESENZA) - VERIFIED
5 internal international entries exist (INFO_APOSTILLE_VS_LEGALIZZAZIONE, INFO_TRADUZIONE_TIPI, INFO_DOCUMENTI_ESTERI_ITALIA, INFO_DOCUMENTI_ITALIANI_ESTERO, INFO_FISCALITA_STRANIERI) - VERIFIED
Pre-start for TRADUZIONE_GIURATA with client_type=non_eu_citizen returns international.relevant=true with translation and validation guidance - VERIFIED
Pre-start for VAT_OPEN_PF with client_type=eu_citizen returns international.relevant=true with additional_requirements (codice fiscale, attestato) - VERIFIED
Pre-start for DOC_MISSING_REQUEST with client_type=private returns international.relevant=false - VERIFIED
Pre-start international block includes safety_note for cross-border procedures - VERIFIED
Pre-start for non_eu_citizen includes legalization guidance (may_need_legalization=true) - VERIFIED
Pre-start for eu_citizen does NOT include legalization guidance (may_need_legalization=false) - VERIFIED
CreatePracticePage shows 5 client types: Privato, Professionista, Azienda, Cittadino UE, Extra-UE - VERIFIED
Client type 'non_eu_citizen' filters procedures to show international entries - VERIFIED
InternationalGuidanceCard renders in prepare phase (data-testid='international-card') - VERIFIED
InternationalGuidanceCard shows translation block (data-testid='intl-translation-block') - VERIFIED
InternationalGuidanceCard shows validation block (data-testid='intl-validation-block') - VERIFIED
InternationalGuidanceCard shows additional requirements (data-testid='intl-requirements-block') - VERIFIED
InternationalGuidanceCard shows safety note (data-testid='intl-safety-note') - VERIFIED
Services page shows 'Documenti internazionali' area (data-testid='area-card-international') - VERIFIED
Catalog page shows 'Internazionale' category filter with 13 procedures - VERIFIED
All UI text is in Italian as required - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested existing seeded data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified International/EU/Foreign-user flows. Key verified: (1) 7 catalog categories including 'internazionale' with 13 procedures. (2) 136 total catalog entries. (3) 8 official international procedures + 5 internal support entries. (4) Pre-start intelligence returns international guidance block with translation, validation, additional_requirements, and safety_note. (5) non_eu_citizen gets legalization guidance (may_need_legalization=true), eu_citizen does not. (6) CreatePracticePage shows 5 client types: private, freelancer, company, eu_citizen, non_eu_citizen. (7) InternationalGuidanceCard renders with all blocks when international guidance is relevant. (8) Services page has 'Documenti internazionali' area. (9) Catalog page has 'Internazionale' category filter. (10) All UI in Italian.
